_description: Terrapact Intimidator ETB punisher choice. Alice has {1}{R} available to cast Terrapact Intimidator. On resolution, the ETB trigger targets Bob, who chooses: (A) 'Have them create two Lander tokens' — Alice gets two Lander tokens on her battlefield; or (B) 'Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature' — Terrapact becomes a 4/3 with two +1/+1 counters. Test both branches.
